title: Vue Starter Project for Monday Apps
excerpt:
Hi all 
I would like to share a simple repo for making Vue based Monday apps. 
It is a very simple app (simpler than the Vue CLI starter). 
An ngrok tunnel is automatically setup and url copied to clipboard if turned on. …

posts.author: amit.lzkpa (Amit Nambiar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all
I would like to share a simple repo for making Vue based Monday apps.

It is a very simple app (simpler than the Vue CLI starter).
An ngrok tunnel is automatically setup and url copied to clipboard if turned on.
Feel free to fork, update as your wish.

GitHub

GitHub - amitlzkpa/starter-monday-vue

Contribute to amitlzkpa/starter-monday-vue development by creating an account on GitHub.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey hey @amit.lzkpa

I’ve already sung some accolades for you in the other thread, but honestly, I truly appreciate your approach here. It means a lot to me that you’ve pioneered a path for other users and made the journey on using Vue when building monday.apps easier

Thanks so much for giving back and for caring about other developers who might run into similar issues when starting out.

-Alex
